questions.question: What is the primary function of an Artificial Neural Network (ANN)?
questions.explanation: Artificial Neural Networks are primarily designed to recognize patterns and make predictions or decisions based on input data.

questions.question: Which type of Artificial Neural Network is also known as Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP)?
questions.explanation: The Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) is a type of Artificial Neural Network known as a Feedforward Network, where data flows only in one direction.

questions.question: One of the most popular applications of Artificial Neural Networks is in Image Recognition. Which of the following is an example of this?
questions.explanation: Artificial Neural Networks are widely used in Image Recognition systems to classify and identify objects in images.

questions.question: Which of the following is a Disadvantage of Artificial Neural Networks?
questions.explanation: One of the main disadvantages of Artificial Neural Networks is Overfitting, where the model becomes too complex and performs poorly on new, unseen data.

questions.question: One of the major Challenges of Artificial Neural Networks is
questions.explanation: One of the major challenges of Artificial Neural Networks is Model Interpretability, where it is difficult to understand why a particular decision was made.
